description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a combination of light and dark exterior wall panels. The front facade displays large, evenly spaced windows and a central entrance, while the side and rear elevations have fewer windows, providing privacy for the interior rooms. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions separating bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathroom. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of painted concrete or stucco, wood paneling, and large glass window panes. The roof is flat and likely constructed from reinforced concrete or similar material, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a minimalist rectangular design featuring light and dark wall panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the open interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, dark wall with several windows and the extended flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a back door and fewer windows, emphasizing privacy and utility access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing grouped windows and the overall length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
